breakdown: This PR migrates inline skeptic gate polling logic (70+ lines of bash script with API rate limit handling, polling loops, and verdict parsing) to a reusable workflow reference. The architectural improvement is significant—reducing duplication and separating concerns—but the diff lacks context about the external workflow and provides no documentation. Error handling is delegated to the external workflow, which is opaque from this diff. Input types for runner_labels could be explicitly typed.
key_changes: Replaced ~70 lines of inline polling script with reusable workflow reference
Added inputs: pr_number, head_sha, runner_labels, concurrency_group to pass to reusable workflow
Used secrets: inherit to pass through required credentials
Removed all bash-based polling, API rate limit handling, and verdict parsing logic
Delegated VERDICT processing to external skeptic-gate-reusable.yml workflow
